nasb.text: He shall then cut it into its pieces with its head and its suet, and the priest shall arrange them on the wood which is on the fire that is on the altar.

esv.text: And he shall cut it into pieces, with its head and its fat, and the priest shall arrange them on the wood that is on the fire on the altar,

cnv.text: 那人要把燔祭牲切成塊子；祭司就把肉塊、頭和脂肪，排列在祭壇炭火上的木柴上面；

ccb.text: 献祭者将羊切成块后，祭司要把肉块、头颅和脂肪摆在祭坛燃烧的木柴上。
